title: Dryopsila cinerea
taxonomy: Dryopsila cinerea is a species of plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This family is commonly known as the African violet or gesneriad family. The Gesneriaceae family is a group of flowering plants that are primarily native to the tropical regions of the Americas and Africa. They are known for their attractive flowers and foliage, and are often cultivated as ornamental plants. The classification of Dryopsila cinerea within the Gesneriaceae family is further divided into various genera and species.
